name: Notebook Paper
description: Classic ruled notebook page with aligned baseline rhythm and margin line.

preview.sampleText: Ruled lines and fixed rhythm for structured writing.

classes.h1: m-0 mb-[40px] text-[32px] leading-[40px] font-bold tracking-tight text-zinc-800
classes.h2: m-0 mt-[40px] text-[24px] leading-[40px] font-semibold text-zinc-800
classes.h3: m-0 mt-[40px] text-[20px] leading-[40px] font-semibold text-zinc-800
classes.h4: m-0 mt-[40px] text-[18px] leading-[40px] font-semibold text-zinc-800
classes.h5: m-0 mt-[40px] text-[16px] leading-[40px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-wide text-zinc-700
classes.h6: m-0 mt-[40px] text-[14px] leading-[40px] font-semibold uppercase tracking-[0.12em] text-zinc-600
classes.th: border border-[#d5dbe5] px-3 py-2 bg-[#eef2f7] text-left font-semibold text-zinc-800
classes.blockquote: my-[40px] border-l-4 border-[#e5a4a4] pl-4 text-[20px] leading-[40px] italic text-zinc-700 bg-white/50
classes.code: bg-[#ece7dc] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded font-mono text-[0.9em] text-zinc-800
classes.pre: my-[40px] rounded-md border border-[#d8d1c3] bg-[#f1ede4] p-4 overflow-x-auto
classes.body: bg-local w-full min-h-full bg-[#f8f7f3] bg-local pl-12 pr-8 pt-[40px] pb-[40px] bg-[linear-gradient(to_right,transparent_31px,#e5a4a4_31px,#e5a4a4_32px,transparent_32px),repeating-linear-gradient(to_bottom,transparent_0px,transparent_39px,#9db7d7_39px,#9db7d7_40px)]
